title: Flaky American Citrus Wine Bruschetta
description: This citrusy, fluffy dish is a crowd-pleaser and features dry white wine for an unexpected twist, with options for those following a keto-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: Fresh Citrus Juices
ingredients.notes: To bring out the freshness of the bruschetta

ingredients.name: Dijon Mustard
ingredients.notes: Opt for a low-sodium version if using dairy-free ingredients

ingredients.name: White Wine Vinegar
ingredients.notes: Use a dry white wine for this recipe

ingredients.name: Sea Salt
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of savory flavor

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: For seasoning and balance in taste

ingredients.name: Almond Flour
ingredients.notes: Optional if you prefer not to add an extra carb load

instructions: Toast the bread slices until golden brown, removing them from heat immediately.
In a mixing bowl, combine lemon zest, fresh citrus juices, Dijon mustard, white wine vinegar, sea salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Drizzle the mixture over each toasted slice of bread, ensuring they are evenly coated with the bruschetta mixture.
Sprinkle almond flour lightly on top of the bread slices for an extra crispy texture if desired, then return them to heat briefly until slightly golden brown.
Serve immediately as a snack or side dish.
